notes:
## v0.5.0 - Native Win32 Keyboard Hooks & Fragment Rendering

### Core Engine Overhaul
- Native WH_KEYBOARD_LL hook replacing rdev for maximum compatibility
- Fragment-based rendering pipeline (Text/KeyPress/Delay/Shortcut)
- Native SendInput for reliable text injection across all apps
- Dead key & accent character support
- UTF-16 surrogate pair support for emoji

### Performance
- Removed 100ms debounce — instant trigger response
- HashMap O(1) keyword lookups
- Filtered DB queries for trigger-eligible snippets only

### Reliability
- Mouse click combo breaker (WH_MOUSE_LL)
- Modifier key backup/restore during substitution
- Configurable clipboard restore delay (500ms)
- Excluded application support via GetForegroundWindow
